title: CraftTracker
description: Pin any JEI recipe and track ingredients live — compact HUD with checkmarks and counts. Works with Create and all JEI recipes.
body:
# CraftTracker
**Never lose track of what you need to craft.**
Open any recipe in **JEI**, click the **pin button**, and CraftTracker shows a live checklist of every ingredient — like a Jade tooltip, but for crafting.
## How it works
1. Open **JEI** and find a recipe (vanilla, modded machines, **Create**, etc.)
2. Click the **map pin** on the recipe page
3. A compact HUD appears showing each ingredient:
   - **✓** — you have enough in your inventory
   - **5/6** — you have 5, need 6
4. Press **Delete** or **Shift+click** the pin to stop tracking
## Features
- **One-click tracking** — pin once, HUD stays until you clear it
- **Compact HUD** — small panel, configurable size and position
- **In-game settings** — Mods → CraftTracker → Config (position, scale, auto-hide)
- **Create support** — mixing, pressing, sequenced assembly — anything JEI shows
- **Smart inventory check** — optional hotbar and offhand counting
- **Auto-hide** — hide HUD when all ingredients are collected (configurable)
## Requirements
- Minecraft **1.21.1**
- **NeoForge**
- **JEI 19.27.0+** (required)
Create is optional — Create recipes are tracked automatically through JEI.
## Controls
| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Delete | Clear tracked recipe |
| (bind in Controls) | Toggle HUD / Open settings |
